titleStmt.title: SII 30.230: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 230. (A.R. No. 581 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District Madhyasthanātha temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Jaṭ. Kulasēkara-Pāṇḍya: Year 13+4: 1207 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti of the king Pūvin kiḻatti etc. This inscription records the exemption of the taxes such as kaḍamai, antarāyam, silvari, and peruvari on four vēli of land by the king who sent his order to the mahasabhā of Pirāntakachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Āri-nāḍu. The land had been previously sold to the temple of Piṇakkaṟutta nāyanār at Sri Parantaka-chaturvedimaṅgalam by the above sabhā who were now ordered by the king to exempt the taxes on this land. Several persons figures as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūviṉ kiḻatti meviviṟṟiruppa metiṉimātu nītiyiṟ puṇara viyappor maṭantai jayapuyattiruppa mākkalaimaṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅka ticaiyiru nāṉkil
micai nilāveṟippa maṟaineṟi tikaḻa maṉuneṟi vaḷara Aṟaneṟic camaiyaṅkaḷāṟuntaḻaippa kāṉaveṅkaiyai villuṭaṉ tuṟantu
mīṉaṅ kaṉakācaṉattu vīṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta Eḻu kaṭaleḻu peraḻil veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅkol naṭappak koṭuṅkali
naṭuṅkiṉeṭumpilattoḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭavarāṭavar pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟai muṟaip pa
ṇiya Iru nemiyaḷavumoru nemiyoṅka yiṉnamutākiya Iyalicai nāṭaka maṉṉi vaḷara maṇimuṭi cūṭi veṟpaṉa
voṅkiya vīrasimhāsaṉattuk kaṟpaka niḻaṟkīṭ kalaivalo pukaḻ maṉṉavar teviyar vaṇaṅki niṉṟetta Aṉṉamen
naṭaiyavaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoṟ(c)aiṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ śrīkula
cekharadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 vatiṉetir nālāmāṇṭu Ārināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī parāntakac caturvetimaṅkalattu m(ā)
hāsabhaiyom nammūr piṇakkaṟukkum tevar koyilil devarkanmikkum śrīmāheśvarakaṇkāṇi ceyvāṉukku
m Ittevaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟaṭalakkuḷam teṉpiṭākai Ulakūyyavanta pāṇṭiyapererik kīḻk kāṭuveṭṭi Ivvūrk
kaṭamaiyiṟukkuṅ kolāl nilam nāluvelikku Iṟaiyiliyākak kaṭamai Antarāyakkāṭci nāṭṭokari kāriyavārāṭci
kaṟpūravilaiyum Uṭpaṭa tavirttomeṉṟu prasādam ceytaruḷiṉa śrīmukamun tiruvāykeḻviyum vantamaiyil Innilam nā
luvelikkum cilvariyum peruvariyum viniyokaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavun tavirttu kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom piṇa
kkaṟukkum devar koyilil devakaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukku Ippaṭikku tiruvāyk keḻvippaṭi kalliluñ
cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷa veṇumeṉṟu puliyūrkiḻavaṉ piraḷai viṭaṅkaṉ Abhaiyampukkāṉ Atdhittamaiyil Ippiṭipāṭṭiṉ paṭiye ca
ndrādittavaṟ cella kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷka Ivai kirāñci rudrabhaṭṭaṉ makaṉ tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇapaṭaṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai peruvāyil nampi Eñyamurtti Eḻuttu Ivai pacalai śrīmātavaṉ cen=tapirāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pacalai cen=tāmaraik kaṇṇaṉ śrīmādhavaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Iṟaiyāṉ ceri jādavedaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṇṭūrc ceṇpaka nampi Eḻuttu Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu śrīmādhavabhaṭaṭaṉ makaṉ tiruveṅkaṭanārāya
ṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṇṭūr tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tirupper caṅkara nārāyaṇaṉ suriyadevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nampūrpulla śarmmabhaṭṭa
s[omayā]jiyār makaṉ subrahmaṇyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kan=tāṭai nārāyaṇaṉ nampi Eḻuttu Ivai tirunallūr caṅkara nārāyaṇa bhaṭaṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai
pacalai sāṅgana poruḷāḷaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nampūr traiyilo kyanāda bhaṭaṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai muppilā tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kantā
ṭaip rāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai neṭṭūr tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇa bhaṭaṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai Iruṅkaṇṭi Aḻakar Eḻuttu Ivai peru
vāyil �vedaṉ Aṭikaḷ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruttaṅkāl Aṉavaratāṉa cirāmatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuravaceri tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
Irāyūr devadevabhaṭaṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai peruvāyil Accutaṉ Aṭikaḷ Eḻuttu Ivai peruvāyil cen=taṉ māṟaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai peruvāyilaṭikaḷ Eḻuttu
Ivai tirukkaṭavūr mahādevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai gomaṅkalattu nārāyaṇaṉ śrīrāghavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Iruṅkaṇṭi Aḻakaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Oṭappuṟai Āṭkoṇṭa
villi Eḻuttu Ivai karāñci ka Eḻuttu Ivai kārāmpicceṭṭu śrīrāghavabhaṭaṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai Iṟaiyāṉ ceri tirumāliruñcolai
devadevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kan=tāṭai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nālūr Iḷaiya koppiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai tūppil śrīdharabhaṭaṭa somayāji Eḻuttu marutūr sarvakratu
bhaṭaṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai gomaṭattu cirākavatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Oṭappuṟai śrīraṅganādha bhaṭṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai Amittirivalli Uṭaiyāṉ karu
māṇikkam tillai nāyakaṉ śrī parān=taka muven=taveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ippiṭipāṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ sabhaikkaṉakkuRead- sabhaikkaṇakku śrīpa
rān=takaveḷāṉ kaṇakku Irumpūḷai Uṭaiyāṉ Uyyak koṇṭi Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu svastiśrī .
Digital edition of SII 30.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
